channel.title: Unifyl Updates
channel.description: Unifyl — AI-Powered Dual-Pane File Manager for macOS

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Unifyl 1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Dual-pane file management with tabs and workspaces
  • AI-powered semantic search, smart tagging, and AI rename
  • Archive virtual folders (ZIP, 7z, TAR, RAR, and more)
  • 10 built-in viewers (text, hex, image, PDF, video, audio, web, markdown, code, media info)
  • Advanced search with Smart Folders
  • File compare, directory sync, and 3-way merge
  • Git integration, inline terminal, and developer tools
  • 12 themes, SVG icon packs, and 120+ custom keyboard shortcuts
  • Cloud and remote connections (FTP, SFTP, WebDAV, S3, Google Drive, Dropbox, OneDrive)
  • Full VoiceOver accessibility support
